System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference V4Y__soft_serie_6152_J81.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol KWP2000
Baudrate N/A
Send ID N/A
Receive ID N/A
Functional Addr 7A
Functional Name Injection

Sent Bytes 14FF00
Reply Bytes N/A

Sent Bytes 1180
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
Reset Status
Frame A0 - Engine Control General I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 21A0
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
ADV adjust value - ADVADJAmbient pressure (msb) - PAMBBattery voltage - VBCalculated load value - RTCLVDropping resister voltage - DRVDwell angle - TDWLLEngine speed - NRPMEvap purge duty cycle - EVPSIgnition timing - ADVIntake air temperature - TANNSET lower limit adjust value - NSET4P/S pressure sensor voltage - PPSVPurge control/V (DUTY) - EVPDTYTemp target idle engine speed - NSETOThrottle valve opening value - TVOVehicle speed - VSPWater Temperature - TWN
Frame A1 - A/F feed back I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 21A1
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
DOS shift P-factor compensation value bank1 - PHOSDOS shift P-factor compensation value bank1 - PHOS+1DOS shift P-factor compensation value bank2 - PHOS+2DOS shift P-factor compensation value bank2 - PHOS+3Lambda control coefficient (Bank 1) - ALPHA(BANK1)Lambda control coefficient (Bank 2) - ALPHA(BANK2)Lambda control learning value (Bank 1) - KBLRC(BANK1)Lambda control learning value (Bank 2) - KBLRC(BANK2)O2 heater voltage (bank 1) - O2HCUR1O2 heater voltatge (bank 2) - O2HCUR2O2/S heater ONDUTY (Bank 1) - O2HDTYO2/S output voltage (Bank 1) - VO21O2/S output voltage (Bank 2) - VO22Rear O2 heater voltage (Bank 1) - ROHCR1Rear O2 heater voltage (Bank 2) - ROHCR2Rear O2/S heater ONDUTY(Bank 1) - O2HDTYRRrO2/S output voltage (Bank 1) - VRO21RrO2/S output voltage (Bank 2) - VRO22

Sent Bytes 21A2
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
Current C-VTC angle (Bank 1) - VTCNOW(R)Current C-VTC angle (Bank 2) - VTCNOW(L)Current C-VTC angle 2 (Bank 1) - VTCNOW2(R)Current C-VTC angle 2 (Bank 2) - VTCNOW2(L)C-VTC drive DUTY cycle (Bank 1) - VTCDUTY(R)C-VTC drive DUTY cycle (Bank 2) - VTCDUTY(L)C-VTC target angle - VTCTRGC-VTC target angle 2 - VTCTRG2POS signal monitor - POSC
Frame A3 - CC/SL (RV/LV) I/O Sequence
Sent Bytes 21A3
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
ACC main switche - SWMANACCACC request movement flag - ECMACCONACC status - STATUACCAccel pedal diagnosis info flag - FNGAPSAccelerator of ASCD - GASCDAccelerator unusual judgment flag - GASCDNGASCD failure flag - ASCDFAILASR in regulation - ASRINREGBraking flag - FDACNFRECruise control flag - CRUISECruise control request torque - TECOMCruise control status - CRUCONCruise control status 2 - ETARVMXDriver command connect flag - FCNXBTVDriver objective vehicle speed - VITCONMXDriver request for CAN - PEDALMUXGear ratio engaged - GMRLVMONTRLVMONT2Speed limiter request torque - TESPLIMSpeed limiter status - SPELIMSteering switch decode value - COMDRSLSW mode NG1 - SWMDNG1SW mode NG3 - SWMDNG3TCS moving signal flag - TCSACTVehicle speed - VITESMUXVehicle speed invalid flag - FNGASCD

Sent Bytes 21A4
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
FFD ALPHA (bank 1) - FFALP1FFD ALPHA (bank 2) - FFALP2FFD C.L.V. - FFCLVFFD engine speed - FFRPMFFD fuel system status (bank 1) - FFFSS1FFD fuel system status (bank 2) - FFFSS2FFD intake air temperature - FFTANFFD intake manifold pressure - FFBSTFFD KBLRC (bank 1) - FFKBL1FFD KBLRC (bank 2) - FFKBL2FFD NG code - FFNGCFFD TP (msb) - FFTPHFFD TVO - FFTVOFFD vehicle speed - FFVSPFFD water temperature - FFTWN

Sent Bytes 21A5
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items

Reply Bytes N/A

Sent Bytes 21BD
Reply Bytes N/A
Data Items
ACC presence detection - FCNXACCBoolean indicating codes has been learn - CODAPRI3Boolean indicating eeprom vl3 failure - PPEEPVL3Boolean indicating status is protected - ETAPROBoth of brake sw present failure - DACNASRDeactivation due to brake application - DACNCFREDeactivation due to CC/SL failure - DACARVLVDeactivation due to eng./AT Disconn. - DACNBVDeactivation due to engine control - DACACMDeactivation due to invalid VSP - DACAVVIDeactivation due to neut. position - DACNPMDeactivation due to out-of-state VSP - DACAVVNRDeactivation due to set/vehicule sp ratio - DACNRVIDeactivation due to suspend sw press - DACNSUSPDiag. byte of AIRBAG_CRASH frame - MASRNGNGMEN of BSOFNG (Brake sw failure) - BSOFNGNGMEN of BUTMNG (Main sw failure) - BUTMNGNGMEN of CMVLNG (Steer sw failure) - CMVLNGNGMEN of MASRNG (ESP sw failure) - MASRNGOne of brake sw failure) -
